mapper.update: UPDATE provider_key SET provider_key_type = #{providerKeyType}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, encrypted_key = #{encryptedKey}, key_hint = #{keyHint}, enabled = #{enabled}, status = #{status}, schedulable = #{schedulable}, priority = #{priority}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, rate_limited_until = #{rateLimitedUntil}, overloaded_until = #{overloadedUntil}, temp_disabled_until = #{tempDisabledUntil}, last_error_code = #{lastErrorCode}, last_error_message = #{lastErrorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT encrypted_key FROM provider_key WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND enabled = TRUE AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND schedulable = TRUE AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (rate_limited_until IS NULL OR rate_limited_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (overloaded_until IS NULL OR overloaded_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (temp_disabled_until IS NULL OR temp_disabled_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM provider_key_quota_window q WHERE q.provider_key_id = provider_key.id AND q.status = 'ACTIVE' AND q.quota_limit IS NOT NULL AND q.quota_used >= q.quota_limit AND (q.reset_at IS NULL OR q.reset_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ) ORDER BY user_id IS NULL DESC, id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT encrypted_key FROM provider_key WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND enabled = TRUE AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND schedulable = TRUE AND (user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL) AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (rate_limited_until IS NULL OR rate_limited_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (overloaded_until IS NULL OR overloaded_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (temp_disabled_until IS NULL OR temp_disabled_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM provider_key_quota_window q WHERE q.provider_key_id = provider_key.id AND q.status = 'ACTIVE' AND q.quota_limit IS NOT NULL AND q.quota_used >= q.quota_limit AND (q.reset_at IS NULL OR q.reset_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN user_id = #{userId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, id ASC LIMIT 1

FROM provider_key WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND enabled = TRUE AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND schedulable = TRUE AND (user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL) AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (rate_limited_until IS NULL OR rate_limited_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (overloaded_until IS NULL OR overloaded_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (temp_disabled_until IS NULL OR temp_disabled_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM provider_key_quota_window q WHERE q.provider_key_id = provider_key.id AND q.status = 'ACTIVE' AND q.quota_limit IS NOT NULL AND q.quota_used >= q.quota_limit AND (q.reset_at IS NULL OR q.reset_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN user_id = #{userId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, priority ASC, CASE WHEN last_used_at IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, last_used_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE provider_key SET last_used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_success_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE provider_key SET last_used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_failed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error_code = #{errorCode}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE provider_key SET rate_limited_until = #{until}, last_used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_failed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error_code = #{errorCode}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE provider_key SET overloaded_until = #{until}, last_used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_failed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error_code = #{errorCode}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE provider_key SET temp_disabled_until = #{until}, last_used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_failed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error_code = #{errorCode}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE provider_key SET status = 'ERROR', schedulable = FALSE, last_used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_failed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error_code = #{errorCode}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.sql: SELECT id, provider_id, user_id, provider_key_type, base_url, encrypted_key, key_hint, enabled, status, schedulable, priority, rate_limited_until, overloaded_until, temp_disabled_until, expires_at, last_error_code, last_error_message, last_used_at, last_success_at, last_failed_at, created_at, updated_at
